Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please add a version_history array to day03/daily_report.json to track report iterations: v1.0 (09:30 initial draft), v1.1 (10:15 added event timeline data), and v1.2 (current time around 11:00 final review version). Each entry should include version, created_at, and changes fields.
